text: The app keeps crashing every time I try to use the new recommendations feature. Completely unusable.
Recommendations are totally off. It's suggesting products I already bought months ago.
Love the new recommendation layout! Much cleaner than before.
Payment failed twice when I tried to buy a recommended item. Very frustrating.
The new feature is okay. Not sure it's better than the old one yet.
App is so slow now. Everything takes forever to load since the update.
Finally! The recommendations actually make sense now. Found two things I wanted immediately.
I got charged but the order didn't go through. Support hasn't responded in 2 days.
Crashed 3 times in one session. Had to restart the app repeatedly.
Recommendations seem slightly better but the loading time is noticeably worse.
This update broke the app for me. Going back to the old version if possible.
Great update! The personalized picks are spot on for my taste.
Support ticket queue is insane. Waited 3 days and still no reply about my payment issue.
The recommendation engine seems to be recommending random things. No relevance at all.
Mixed feelings. Some recommendations are great, others are completely irrelevant.
App crashes specifically when I scroll through recommendations. Reproducible every time.
Smooth experience on my end. The new UI for recommendations is a big improvement.
Cancelled my subscription because of the constant crashes and slow performance.
Payment page freezes after the update. Had to use a different device to complete purchase.
The feature works but I don't see a huge difference from before honestly.
Three of my friends also reported crashes. This seems like a widespread issue.
Discovered two new products I love through the new recommendations. Keep it up!
Latency is terrible. Pages take 5-8 seconds to load. This wasn't an issue before.
I'm seeing recommendations for items that are out of stock. Pointless.
Interesting new feature but needs some polish. Will give it more time.
Uninstalled the app after the 5th crash today. Will reinstall when this is fixed.
The recommendation algorithm feels much smarter. Very happy with this update.
My payment was declined even though my card is fine. Tried 4 times. Gave up.
Support is overwhelmed. Automated response only, no human follow-up.
App works fine for me but I've seen complaints from others in the community forum.
The new feature is causing battery drain. Phone gets hot when using recommendations.
Best update in months. Recommendations are finally useful and relevant.
Crash on launch after update. Had to clear cache to get it working again.
Revenue impact must be huge with all these payment failures. Someone needs to fix this fast.
Performance seems degraded but the recommendation quality is genuinely better when it works.
